name: coder-contrast
description: CODE-specialized via CONTRAST: Q4_K on the layers code uses differently from a general baseline (not just the generally-hot ones)
_note: The contrast variant of coder-q4boost. Where `coder-q4boost` boosts the 6 highest-ENERGY layers (which are nearly the same for every domain), this boosts the 6 layers the code imatrix diverges most from `general.dat` — the actually code-distinctive layers. Build general.dat first: `forgequant.py imatrix general-baseline`. Inspect the difference with `forgequant.py paths coder.dat --contrast general.dat`.
